metadata.instruction: Recover the file Task ID 79.jpg from Recycle Bin and verify whether it is restored to its previous location in Documents > Task 79 folder.
metadata.context: I accidentally deleted a file with the name Task ID 79.jpg.

l3.rationale: Hover over the Search button in File Explorer.

l4.rationale: Move through File Explorer from Home into Documents and open the Task 79 folder.

l5.rationale: Navigate through the Recycle Bin and its lists to reach the deleted-item area before recovery.
